retrievedDocuments.title: ## Objective 2: Secure Vendor Integrations
retrievedDocuments.content: [## Objective 2: Secure Vendor Integrations] The payment gateway is the lifeblood of our revenue stream. We cannot afford another outage when we deploy the next major version next week. 1:** Achieve a 40% incident reduction target for all authentication-related production incidents. 2:** Reduce the average latency spike during peak payment gateway traffic from 400ms to < 100ms. 3:** Eliminate staging mismatch errors by achieving 100% environment parity between staging and production.
retrievedDocuments.author: Local Corpus

retrievedDocuments.title: ## Next Steps
retrievedDocuments.content: [## Next Steps] The decision to enforce the security review bottleneck, while painful and resulting in a 3 week delay, ultimately saved us from a highly public outage and complicated rollback. - Never deploy a payment gateway without clearing the security review bottleneck first. - Ensure the legacy components are properly mocked in staging to avoid a staging mismatch. - Mandate strict latency spike monitoring on all vendor dependency integrations.
retrievedDocuments.author: Local Corpus
